initial_idea: Multi-agent CLI orchestrator (agent-cli) that combines Claude Code + OpenCode with login auth (PaperClip-based), task distribution, broadcast announcements, agent monitoring, system prompts, and strict dev workflow (branch/plan/review/QA/PR)
codebase_context: 5 reference repos analyzed: claude-code (TypeScript/Bun, OAuth+PKCE, AgentTool/Team/Coordinator), paperclip (TypeScript/Node, better-auth+JWT, heartbeat agents, Express+PostgreSQL), opencode (TypeScript/Bun, Effect system, SolidJS TUI), oh-my-opencode (10 agents, 32 hooks, background manager), oh-my-claudecode (19 agents, 48+ hooks, 55-module team engine, 38 skills)
